mb_dyna_processor.description:
This plugin performs multiband dynamic processing of input signal. Flexible sidechain
control configuration provided. As opposite to most available multiband
processors, this dynamic processor provides numerous special functions: 'modern'
operating mode, 'Sidechain boost', 'Lookahead' option and up to 8 frequency
bands for processing.
mb_dyna_processor.name: Multiband Dynamics Processor
